Our Story

Discipline. Precision.
Purpose.

📷
Instructor Photo
Alexandre Amorim
NRA Certified Firearms Instructor
10+
Years Training
NRA Certified Firearms Instructor
Florida Licensed & Insured
Lockton Affinity — Instructor Coverage
NRA Instructor License #184126353

Samurai Wolf Defense was founded on a simple belief: every responsible citizen deserves access to elite-level firearms training — the kind that actually prepares you for real situations.

The Samurai Wolf name embodies two powerful philosophies — the calculated discipline of the Samurai and the fierce loyalty of the Wolf. Together, they represent a standard of training that never compromises.

Whether you're picking up a firearm for the first time or a seasoned shooter sharpening your edge — you'll find a curriculum built around you, taught by someone who takes safety and excellence seriously.

📷
Range Photo
📷
Class Photo
Mission
Empower every student with the skills and confidence to safely protect those they love.
Vision
Become Florida's most trusted firearms training company, known for precision and results.

Legal Document

Liability Waiver

Read carefully and complete all fields before participating in any class.

SAMURAI WOLF DEFENSE
Participant Waiver & Release of Liability

1. Assumption of Risk

I acknowledge that firearms training involves inherent risks including accidental discharge, ricochets, equipment malfunction, and physical exertion. I voluntarily assume all risks associated with participation in any class or event offered by Samurai Wolf Defense.

2. Release of Liability

I hereby release, waive, and discharge Samurai Wolf Defense, its owner Alexandre Amorim, instructors, agents, and affiliates from any and all liability, claims, and causes of action arising out of participation in any training activity, whether caused by negligence or otherwise.

3. Indemnification

I agree to indemnify and hold harmless the Released Parties from any loss, liability, damage, or cost they may incur due to my participation, including reasonable attorney fees.

4. Medical Authorization

I certify that I am physically and mentally fit to participate in firearms training. I authorize Samurai Wolf Defense to obtain emergency medical treatment on my behalf in the event of injury.

5. Rules & Conduct

I agree to follow all safety rules, range commands, and instructor directives. Failure to comply may result in immediate removal from the class without refund.

6. No Refund Policy

All class fees are non-refundable once paid. Rescheduling permitted with 48 hours written notice, subject to availability.

7. Media Release

I grant Samurai Wolf Defense permission to use photographs or videos taken during training for marketing purposes, unless I expressly indicate otherwise in writing.

8. Governing Law

This waiver shall be governed by the laws of the State of Florida.
